name: Chocolate Fudge Eggs
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 5/8 oz ea) Choc Pudding Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, pudding mix and milk in a large bowl. Bring mixture to boil over medium heat.
2. Boil for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in confectioners' sugar and vanilla until smooth.
4. When the mixture is cool enough to handle, shape into small eggs.
5. Place the shaped eggs on a wax paper-lined tray.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Melt the dipping chocolate according to package instructions.
8. Dip each cooled egg into the melted chocolate.
9. Place the dipped eggs back onto the wax paper.
10. Allow the coating to harden completely.
11. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 2 1/2 pounds of fudge filling.
